title: Zoul
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Zoul''' was one of the seven seasons of [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. It was also used as a first name for [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrians]] born during this season such as [[Zoul Lavor Xariv Lar]] and [[Zoul Minchov Dwæer]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
